title: Rolson E Socket Set: 14 Sizes with 3 Different Drive Shaft Widths 38640
features: ¼”” Drive E4, E5, E6, E7 E8
⅜”” Drive E10, E11, E12, E14
description: A specialised E drive socket set of fittings for use in the automotive area. They are manufactured from chrome vanadium steel with a matt finish and knurled grip. The set is supplied on a sturdy metal socket rail which can be mounted onto the workshop wall or tool rack.
